title: SB 474 (The BASIC Act) would reduce the markup of products sold at prison canteens, which can exceed anywhere between 63% to 200% above market value

raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "SB 474 would reduce markups on products sold in prison canteen stores to a cap of 35% for four years.",
    "The current canteen markup for products can exceed between 63% to 200% above market value.",
    "Incarcerated individuals do not receive enough food or personal hygiene items to survive with dignity.",
    "Prices of essential items in prison canteens have increased at least three times in the past year.",
    "Toothpaste in prison canteens is sold for $6, coffee for $9.05, and toilet paper for $1 per roll.",
```
